config_template.constraints: shape[{DIM}] % {N} == 0; observed N in {2, 6}; observed {DIM} in {-1, 2, -2}

applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Frequently followed by elementwise consumers per-branch: silu(gate) * t (swiglu), (1 + scale) * norm(x) + shift (AdaLN modulation), typecast of gate branches to bfloat16. The chunk itself is a view-style split; downstream fusion candidates are silu-mul and dynamic-weight layernorm.

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (timestep/modulation embedding, e.g. temb_11BD / shifted_temb_1BTD / scale_shift_1BSD)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: small modulation tensor: shape ~ (1, B, T<=6, D) or (1, 1, B, D); last-dim split into 2 or 6 chunks
placement_observations.source: call_site: wan2.2/transformer-block AdaLN modulation paths (no explicit memory_config passed; tensor produced by linear/silu on temb, default interleaved placement)

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (activation tensor t in swiglu MLP)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: large activation: (..., seq, 2*hidden); split into 2 along dim=-1
placement_observations.source: call_site: activation dispatch (activation_fn == 'swiglu'); no explicit memory_config at call site
